subcodes.first_line: The Supreme Horizon hath shone forth from the Daystar of utterance, inasmuch as He Who conversed on Sinai hath established Himself upon the Throne of Manifestation. Blessed is he who [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: قد لاح الافق الاعلی من نیر البیان اذ استوی مکلم الطور علی عرش الظهور طوبی لمن
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @Manifestation of God speaking in the voice of Divinity, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @rejection, opposition and persecution
